features: Elegant Design ----- 1x White sashes with gold lettering 'Bride to Be' and 10x Rose gold sashes with gold lettering 'Team Bride'. 31 * 3.7Inch length is suitable for most people to wear. The sash has already been stitched together at the ends so it will easily go over your shoulder without the need for a pin.

Bride Headband Tiara & Veil & Temporary Tattoos----- The bride headband tiara is made of metal alloy, letters bride on the top, it is lightweight for wearing. The tiara is 4.9 inches (12.5cm) wide, one size fits most people. Double layered satin edge cascading veil, with Plastic Comb is easy to wear.

Package includes ----- 1 white Bride to Be Sash, 10 rose gold Team Bride Sashes, 1Pcs Bride Headband Tiara, 1Pcs Bride Veil with Comb, 3 sheet Bride Tattoo. 3 Sheets metallic Hen Party Tattoos design for the bride and her entire bride tribe. Easily removable with baby oil, coconut oil.

Unique Design ----- Highlight the bride and team bride on your team with these unique bachelorette party decoration sets. Makes your team popular at bachelor parties,it comes with shiny fonts makes your team look more unique in the crowd and exudes charm.

Memorable Celebration ----- Perfect for wedding photo props, bridal showers, souvenirs, bachelor nights, team brides, bachelor parties and girls night parties. You will have a memorable celebration when own this hen party decoration set.
description: From the brand Previous page AniSqui 's wedding collection is a tribute to the beauty of love and the sanctity of commitment. Our range of wedding products is designed to celebrate the union of hearts with elegance and grace. From delicate table settings to intricately designed decor, every item is crafted to make your special day a fairy tale come to life. Why choose us? At AniSqui, we offer a wide range of fun and high-quality products specifically designed for Hen parties. Our items are curated to create memorable and enjoyable celebrations. What about our after-sales service? We provide top-notch after-sales service, ensuring hassle-free returns, quick exchanges, and prompt assistance to ensure a seamless shopping experience. What is our mission? AniSqui's mission is to offer premium single-party products and exceptional service, making every event special and every purchase smooth, reliable, and fun. Next page
